name: StarCoder (15.5B)
archDisplay: GPT-2-style decoder with multi-query attention (GPTBigCode) + fill-in-the-middle, 8K context
note: Pivotal 15.5B open code LLM trained on The Stack across 80+ languages; matched Codex-cushman on HumanEval/MBPP.

results.notes: DS-1000 overall pass@1 in completion mode, 26.0%, verbatim from the official HF model card / StarCoder paper (arXiv:2305.06161) evaluation table; cross-confirmed via direct model-card fetch.

Single-line fill-in-the-middle (HumanEval-Infilling) benchmark, Python split, from Table 17 of the StarCoder paper. Cross-validated: the same table's SantaCoder figures (Java 0.62/JS 0.60/Python 0.44) match SantaCoder's own published model-card model-index exactly, giving high confidence the StarCoder figures (Java 0.73/JS 0.74/Python 0.62) are accurately relayed.

FIN-bench (Finnish) average, 3-shot, as reported by TurkuNLP/Silo AI in Table 6 of the Poro 34B paper (arXiv:2404.01856), evaluating StarCoder as a reference model alongside Poro 34B despite it being a code-focused model.

verificationNotes: Fetched HF blog (dated 2023-05-04) and model card: confirmed ~15B params, 80+ languages, BigCode OpenRAIL-M, HumanEval 33.6/MBPP 52.7 verbatim. No changes.
